markdownRemark.excerpt: As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, Due to the daylight savings time change beginning on Sunday, March, 8th, Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s 40 Aḥadīth…
markdownRemark.html:
As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Due to the daylight savings time change beginning on Sunday, March, 8th, Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s 40 Aḥadīth Class will begin at 5:30pm at Muṣallá As-Ṣaḥāba, unless further advised. There will also be a telelink to As-Ṣaḥāba Library, in-shāʾ-Allāh.

Please pass on this message.

Jazākumullahu khair.

frontmatter.title: Darul-Hadith: The Book of Prayer Intensive Course
